NAME: Dungeon Master
DESCRIPTION: Master the depths of data like a classic roguelike dungeon master

CHARACTER_TYPES.OK_SYSTEM_FAREWELL: The Oracle returns to silent contemplation.

MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_SCREEN_CLEARED: The mists clear from your vision.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_FILE_LOADED: You unroll the tome '{file_path}' onto slate '{panel_name}'.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_FILE_SAVED: You carefully inscribe slate '{panel_name}' into tome '{file_path}'.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_PANEL_CREATED: A new slate '{panel_name}' materializes before you.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_PANEL_SELECTED: You focus your attention on slate '{panel_name}'.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_SCRIPT_EXECUTED: The spell scroll '{script_file}' is successfully invoked.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_CLOSED_EDITOR: You roll up the tome '{file_path}' and set it aside.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_REPAIR_STARTED: The dungeon master awakens and begins restoration...
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_REPAIR_COMPLETE: The dungeon has been lovingly restored to its former glory.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_ANALYSIS_COMPLETE: Your study of the ancient runes reveals their secrets.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_MAP_MOVED: You traverse to the chamber at ({x}, {y}).
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_MAP_TELEPORT: POOF! You teleport to ({x}, {y}) in a flash of light.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_DESCENDED: You delve deeper into the {layer} realm.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_ASCENDED: You climb up to the {layer} realm.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_THEME_CHANGED: Reality shifts around you. Welcome to {theme} mode.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_PROJECT_CREATED: A new quest '{name}' has been decreed.
MESSAGES.ACTION_SUCCESS_CHARACTER_CREATED: A new adventurer '{name}' enters the dungeon.
MESSAGES.INFO_EXIT: Farewell, brave adventurer. May your next quest be fruitful!
MESSAGES.INFO_REPAIR_RUNNING: The dungeon master stirs, examining the realm's integrity...
MESSAGES.INFO_UNDO_EMPTY: Time stands still. No actions to reverse.
MESSAGES.INFO_REDO_EMPTY: The future is unwritten. No actions to repeat.
MESSAGES.INFO_OFFLINE_MODE: [OFFLINE MODE] The oracle sleeps. Using local tomes...
MESSAGES.INFO_MAP_POSITION: You are at chamber ({x}, {y}) in the {layer} realm
MESSAGES.ERROR_SYNTAX: 💀 INCANTATION FAILED - The words make no sense
MESSAGES.ERROR_INVALID: 💀 FORBIDDEN MAGIC - That spell is beyond your power
MESSAGES.ERROR_PERMISSIONS: 💀 WARDED - You lack the proper keys
MESSAGES.ERROR_EMPTY_SLATE: 💀 BLANK SLATE - Nothing is inscribed here
MESSAGES.ERROR_NO_PATH: 💀 NO PASSAGE - The way is blocked
MESSAGES.ERROR_UNKNOWN_MODULE:
💀 UNKNOWN CHAMBER: '{module}'
   💡 Valid chambers: FILE, SYSTEM, ASSISTANT, RESOURCE
   Type HELP for complete list
MESSAGES.ERROR_UNKNOWN_SYSTEM_COMMAND:
💀 UNKNOWN INCANTATION: '{command}'
   💡 Type HELP SYSTEM for system spells
MESSAGES.ERROR_UNKNOWN_FILE_COMMAND:
💀 UNKNOWN TOME COMMAND: '{command}'
   💡 Type HELP FILE for file operations
MESSAGES.ERROR_UNKNOWN_GRID_COMMAND:
💀 UNKNOWN SLATE COMMAND: '{command}'
   💡 Type HELP GRID for grid spells
MESSAGES.ERROR_COMMAND_NOT_FOUND:
💀 SPELL '{command}' NOT IN SPELLBOOK
   💡 Type HELP to see all available spells
MESSAGES.ERROR_AI_NO_KEY: 💀 OK ORACLE SILENT - Inscribe GEMINI_API_KEY in sacred .env
MESSAGES.ERROR_UNKNOWN_AI_COMMAND:
💀 UNKNOWN OK ORACLE COMMAND: '{command}'
   💡 Try: OK ASK <question>
MESSAGES.ERROR_LAYER_NOT_FOUND:
💀 UNKNOWN REALM: '{layer}'
   💡 Valid realms: SURFACE, DUNGEON-1, CLOUD
MESSAGES.ERROR_CITY_NOT_FOUND:
💀 UNKNOWN ANCHOR: '{city}'
   💡 Use TILE LIST to see available locations
MESSAGES.ERROR_THEME_NOT_FOUND:
💀 UNKNOWN REALITY: '{theme}'
   💡 Available: dungeon, foundation, galaxy, science
MESSAGES.ERROR_KNOWLEDGE_NOT_FOUND:
💀 TOME NOT FOUND: '{topic}'
   💡 Use BANK SEARCH to find knowledge
MESSAGES.ERROR_CHARACTER_DEAD: 💀 {name} has died! Press 'y' to continue or 'n' to quit.
MESSAGES.ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_LEVEL: 💀 You are not experienced enough for this action.
MESSAGES.ERROR_CURSED_ITEM: 💀 The {item} is cursed! You cannot remove it.
